summary: Verified z-index bug fix for dropdowns, popovers, and select menus inside modal dialogs. All tests PASSED - dropdowns now appear ABOVE dialogs as expected.
passed_tests: Role dropdown in 'Create New User' dialog appears above dialog (z-9999 > z-60) ✓
Department dropdown in 'Create New User' dialog appears above dialog ✓
Region dropdown in 'Create New User' dialog appears above dialog ✓
Dialog overlay (z-50) is below dialog content (z-60) ✓
All dropdown options are visible and selectable ✓
Select component z-index verified as 9999 via computed styles ✓
context_for_next_testing_agent: The z-index bug fix has been successfully verified. All overlay components (select, popover, dropdown-menu, tooltip) have z-[9999] which ensures they appear above dialog content (z-[60]) and dialog overlay (z-50). Toast notifications (sonner) have z-index: 99999. The fix was applied to base UI components in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/ and affects all dialogs throughout the application.
testing_method: Playwright browser automation with computed style verification
